name: Jaclyn New Velvet Tufted Club Chair - Navy - Christopher Knight Home
description: This Christopher Knight Home Jaclyn New Velvet Club Chair is a great addition for any home. With its tufted back and studded trim, this chair is a statement in and of itself. The cushioned seat provides extra comfort while seated, and the tufted back allows you to relax against clouds. Place this chair in your living room as extra seating or add it to your bedroom to make a quiet retreat for yourself. Overall, this Christopher Knight Home Jaclyn New Velvet Club Chair is a must have for your home.
